patch.value: SDK: bundled extensions use internal imports instead of @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk

Bundled extensions (beads, todos) import from ../../../../src/core/... instead of @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk. While valid for bundled extensions that ship with the package, this sets a bad example for third-party extension authors. Should either provide a starter template using SDK imports or document that bundled extensions intentionally use internal paths.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Audit finding: bundled extensions (beads, todos) intentionally use ../../../../src/core/... internal imports since they ship as part of the repo and need direct access to internal APIs. Third-party/external extensions should use @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk public API. This is by-design for bundled extensions and not a bug. The SDK already exports defineExtension() and all necessary types for external extension development. Both extensions also contain local toNonEmptyString copies which follow the same pattern as internal CLI code.

patch.value: By-design: bundled extensions use internal imports; external extensions use @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk. SDK already provides defineExtension() and all needed types.

author: audit-agent
